scripts.dev: concurrently --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "yellow,cyan" "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.start: concurrently --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "yellow,cyan" "cd backend && npm start" "cd frontend && npm run preview"
scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
